form.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fourth (29.69) at this track over 515m. Holds top-three claims.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fourth (29.69) at this track over 515m. Holds top-three claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and fell turning into home straight.

form.formComment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but had to settle for the minor money, finishing a 2.25 lengths second (29.56) over 515m at this track. Had won two on end prior to that last start placing. Can atone.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but had to settle for the minor money, finishing a 2.25 lengths second (29.56) over 515m at this track. Had won two on end prior to that last start placing. Can atone.

form.formComment: Ran a better race when second behind Flying Currency at this track last start over 515m (29.65). Has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ran a better race when second behind Flying Currency at this track last start over 515m (29.65). Has to be included.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (29.66) over 515m at this track. Awkward draw to overcome. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third last start (29.66) over 515m at this track. Awkward draw to overcome. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 515m (29.55) beating Above Them All in Grade 5 H on March 30. The last win was in one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with her.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 515m (29.55) beating Above Them All in Grade 5 H on March 30. The last win was in one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with her.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 6 for the first time after finishing a 8 length sixth at The Meadows (30.66) in a Mix 6/7 FIN. Tough line-up and places prospects appear best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Lines up from box 6 for the first time after finishing a 8 length sixth at The Meadows (30.66) in a Mix 6/7 FIN. Tough line-up and places prospects appear best.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by 2.25 lengths at this track (29.42) beating Flying Ducati in a Grade 5 H on March 30. Must be included.

formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by 2.25 lengths at this track (29.42) beating Flying Ducati in a Grade 5 H on March 30. Must be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked and fell on first turn.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 515m. Others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last start finished 5th over 515m at this track beaten 6 lengths (29.86) behind Ready One in a Grade 5 H on March 30. Capable of taking this out.
